Recommended For You NCAA Football: Boise State at Wyoming Protesters in Barcelona demand lower rents to counter a housing crisis in Spain's main cities Experts describe Scott Bessent as a credible, safe pick for US Treasury secretary In an opinion piece published earlier, Bessent defended the potential use of tariffs as a means to raise revenue for the government, protect strategic US industries and negotiate with trading partners Tariffs are a key part of Trump's economic agenda, with the Republican president-elect vowing sweeping duties on allies and adversaries alike
In an opinion piece published earlier, Bessent defended the potential use of tariffs as a means to raise revenue for the government, protect strategic US industries and negotiate with trading partners
Tariffs are a key part of Trump's economic agenda, with the Republican president-elect vowing sweeping duties on allies and adversaries alike
